question: Show all "Tier 1/2" suppliers in Georgia, list their EV Supply Chain Role and Product / Service.
reference_answer: There are 18 Tier 1/2 companies in Georgia (using Updated Location). [Tier 1/2] | Role: Battery Cell | Product: Battery cells for electric mobility Hollingsworth & Vose Co.
